channel.title: Kubai Kevin
channel.description: Practical backend engineering, AI tooling, and developer career advice by Kubai Kevin — a software developer with 10+ years building production systems in fintech and AI.

item.title: Slash LLM costs 60% with a cache
item.description: Cut LLM token spend 60% with Redis caching, deterministic keys, and two TTL buckets — plus cost guardrails and Prometheus metrics to prove it

item.title: Agent context: short-term vs long-term memory
item.description: Cut hallucination rates 18x with PostgreSQL vs Redis for long-running agents — durability, latency, and cost breakdown with RedisJSON and pgvector in 2026.

item.title: 7 graceful degradation traps I’ve hit in production
item.description: Ship 150 ms timeouts and hardcoded fallbacks today — measure p99 latency, error rates, and cost with Prometheus 2.47 and Python 3.11 before you pick any other pattern.

item.title: Observe LLM features 90% faster…
item.description: Cut LLM observability noise 93% with this wrapper — Prometheus metrics, Redis flags, and a 140-line FastAPI service that works on t3.medium.

item.title: 7 ways to measure prompt platform ROI in 2026
item.description: Cut prompt spend 30% with 7 real ways to measure agent platform ROI in 2026 — token logging, Redis caching, and the one metric that actually matters.

item.title: Agent orches break prod: 3 review traps
item.description: Cut agent timeout errors 98% with 3 fixes — timeout alignment, context propagation, and pool sizing. LangChain 0.1.12, Python 3.11, Node 20 LTS, PgBouncer 1.21 included.

item.title: Agent-to-Agent vs MCP: which broke first in 2026
item.description: Cut gateway latency 72% by choosing MCP for tools and A2A for conversations — exact versions, benchmarks, and the DNS mistake that cost us a week in 2026.

item.title: Treat every user input as hostile in 2026
item.description: Block 96 % of prompt-injection attempts in 2026 with deny-by-default policies instead of brittle regex filters — real benchmarks, code samples, and the $1.2k latency mistake most teams repeat.

item.title: AI in local currency: costs that surprise…
item.description: Six weeks in, their AWS bill jumped 300% because the model was running on on-demand p3.8xlarge instances 24/7, and their finance team had no way to…

item.title: AI feature drift: why your model died at midnight
item.description: Cut midnight model drift from 12% to 0.05% — vocabulary drift, memory fragmentation, and ENI cold starts that broke our AI loan predictor in production.

item.title: Negotiate after AI boosts your output
item.description: Cut negotiation friction in 2026: tie AI output to $480k savings, use a portfolio model, and ask for 15% above band. 3 concrete numbers, 2 code samples, Levels.fyi 2026 data.

item.title: Audit logs: ship them fast, keep them forever
item.description: Cut AWS S3 audit log costs 78% while keeping regulators happy — hot/warm/cold tiering, SHA-256 tamper detection, and Node 20 LTS examples.

item.title: Build agent workflows that survive restarts
item.description: Survive agent restarts, model changes, and network blips — durable workflows with Redis 7.2, FastAPI 0.109, and Python 3.11. Learn the one schema trick that saved 45 minutes of downtime.

item.title: AI wrote 40% of our code — here’s what broke our on-call
item.description: Cut on-call pages 77% by switching to symptom-based alerts and static analysis — the exact metrics, tools, and workflows that worked for a Nairobi civic tech team using AI for 40% of their code.

item.title: Internal Dev Portal that developers open daily
item.description: Cut developer onboarding from 3 days to 2 hours with an Internal Dev Portal that developers actually use. Learn how to build an IDP that sticks, not just another Backstage nobody opens.

item.title: AI permissions: Don’t let agents burn your cloud budget
item.description: Cut cloud waste 20-50% with AI agent least-privilege — runtime guards, IAM Roles for Service Accounts, and Policy Sentry in 2026.

item.title: LLMOps 2026: evaluation stack that replaced RAG dashboards
item.description: Cut LLM evaluation drift 40% by replacing RAG dashboards with real user metrics — the updated golden dataset, prompt fixes, and Redis caching we actually use in 2026.

item.title: 7 skills senior engineers need now agents are live
item.description: Cut API response time 60% with async I/O patterns — the 7 skills senior engineers now need once agents run 24/7 and the exact tuning steps that saved teams $3k/month and 47 minutes per incident in 2026.

item.title: AI agents fail without circuit breakers in 2026
item.description: Why I wrote this (the problem I kept hitting) In 2026, every NGO and government dashboard I worked on promised AI agents doing real work: approving…

item.title: AI in slow networks: why models flop where data costs rise
item.description: Cut API data cost 88% and latency 76% for AI features in high-cost, high-latency markets. Learn why global best practices fail and how to adapt them with Redis 7.2, ONNX Runtime 1.16, and Lambda@Edge.
